title: LayerHeadMap
description: Output artefact from Stage 1 activation patching. Maps attention heads and MLP layers to their System 1/2 mode-switching patch-effect scores.

model_id.description: HuggingFace model id or local path used for the experiment.

num_layers.description: Number of transformer layers covered by the patching run.

num_heads.description: Number of attention heads per layer.

think_token.description: The string token used as the System-2 mode trigger.

think_token_id.description: Vocabulary index of the think token.

num_prompt_pairs.description: Number of (System-2, System-1) prompt pairs used.

patching_mode.description: Whether the run used real model activations or synthetic dry-run data.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the run completed.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock time in seconds for the full patching run.

top_attention_heads.description: Top 20 attention heads ranked by mean patch effect (descending).

top_mlp_layers.description: Top 10 MLP layers ranked by mean patch effect (descending).

all_components.description: All components (attention heads + MLP layers) ranked by mean patch effect.

methodology.description: Human-readable description of the patching methodology.

uor_stage.description: UOR-FORGE pipeline stage that produced this artefact.

uor_donor.description: The teacher model donor this artefact characterises.

component_type.description: Whether this component is an attention head or an MLP layer.

head.description: Zero-indexed attention head index. Null for MLP components.

patch_effect_mean.description: Mean patch effect across all prompt pairs. Positive = promotes System-2 mode.

patch_effect_std.description: Standard deviation of patch effect across prompt pairs.

rank.description: Global rank by mean patch effect (1 = highest).
